prompt: Replace the 50% in "Title One" with a random percentage between 60% and 90% to fill in some more realistic data.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the table, locate the cell directly to the right of 'Title One' that currently displays '50%'. Replace this '50%' with a new percentage value between 60% and 90%.
objects: "Present complex data in an easy-to-understand way" subtitle
Top row of five colored header cells: green with two people icons, blue with a coffee cup icon, red with a box icon, yellow with a bar chart icon, and blue with up/down arrows icon
Leftmost column with text labels: "Title One", "Title Two", "Title Three", "Title Four", "Title Five"
A percentage value between 60% and 90% in the cell directly to the right of "Title One"
"50%" in the cells directly to the right of "Title Two", "Title Three", "Title Four", and "Title Five"
"100%" in all cells under the coffee cup icon header
"10%" in all cells under the box icon header
"50%" in all cells under the bar chart icon header
